prompt: Shallow stack pressure proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when stack depth and price support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raise fits because the short stack still gives you enough pressure to win folds now.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise is better when shallow-stack pressure and price both support aggression, because the stack depth still gives you leverage to push folds.
